title: Kill Token
description: This Adds Kill Tokens As a Drop When Players Die.
body:
**About:** This Plugin Adds Kill Tokens Into Your Server. These Drop a Ominous Trial Ket Upon Player Death. This Is a Really Good Plugin As It Can Be Used For Kill Tokens In PvP Servers. The Token Will Be Droped Along With The Loot Of What The Player Already Had.

**How To Download & Use:** Download For Your Correct Version, Then Place Into Your Plugin Server Folder. Usually Allicated In: Files > Plugins.

**Updates & Bug Fixes** Updates & Bug Fixes Will Happen If Any Bugs Are Found. If You Find a Bug Please Report It.
